description:
Implement Oracle Data Redaction on the HR.EMPLOYEES table to protect sensitive data. Create a user 'QA_TESTER' (password 'QaUser#2024') with CONNECT and SELECT privileges on HR.EMPLOYEES. Configure redaction policies so that when 'QA_TESTER' queries the table, SALARY and COMMISSION_PCT are fully redacted to 0, PHONE_NUMBER shows only the last 4 digits, and EMAIL shows only the first letter followed by asterisks. Ensure the 'HR' user continues to see unredacted data.

Connection Details:
- Admin: system/OraclePassword123@localhost:1521/XEPDB1
- HR Schema: hr/hr123@localhost:1521/XEPDB1
